title: Demo: verify BR/BV workflow in loveNovel
description: Smoke-test workflow: triage -> claim -> close -> sync
close_reason: Demo completed: created, triaged with bv, claimed via br --claim, verified state, and synced

title: Improve Library Sort Settings with reset and localization
description: Add one-tap reset-to-default in Library Sort Settings, use localization keys, and verify with tests.
close_reason: Added Library Sort Settings reset-to-default action, migrated sort options to stable storage values with legacy-value fallback, introduced dotted localization keys (en/vi), and added tests for storage/localization plus UI reset flow. Verified with xcodebuild on iPhone 17 Pro: AppSettingsTests passed and TabNavigationUITests sort-settings tests passed.
